title: Nostalgic Floral Cherry Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: A crisp and floral Vietnamese dish featuring halal-friendly cherry tomatoes that evoke nostalgia with its vibrant colors and sweet-tart flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon fish sauce (optional, omit for halal)
2 tablespoons rice vinegar (rice wine vinegar for non-vegetarians)

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the halal-friendly cherry tomatoes and stir-fry until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the wok and cook for another minute, allowing it to release its aromatic compounds.
Drizzle soy sauce (or tamari) and fish sauce (if using), and rice vinegar into the wok. Stir thoroughly to combine all ingredients evenly.
Reduce heat to medium-low and continue stir-frying for an additional 3-5 minutes until everything is well-combined and slightly thickened, adding lime juice towards the end if desired.
Serve hot with a side of steamed rice or as a refreshing appetizer.
